author: Pokémon 公式
text:
[UK] Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves | Main Theme Recording – Behind the Scenes 🎼
Take a behind-the-scenes look at the recording of the main theme for Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves. 🍃🌊

Performed by the NHK Symphony Orchestra, the music signals the beginning of a brand‑new adventure.

Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves is scheduled for release in 2027 exclusive to Nintendo Switch 2!

=================
Performed by: NHK Symphony Orchestra
Conductor: Daisuke Nagamine
=================

Official site: https://www.pokemon.co.uk
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Pokemon
X: https://x.com/PokemonNewsUK
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pokemonnewsuk
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@pokemonuk
